productDisplayName: Vital Gear Unisex Techno Black Backpack
description: Black laptop backpack Two adjustable backpack straps Mesh padding at the back One main zipped compartment with a padded separator with Velcro straps to close and an internal net pouch One big compartment in front with an internal padded pocket attached near the top One small compartment in the front with a number of open organiser pouches, key holder, pen holders and mobile holder Two mesh open pockets on the side Warranty: 3 years
